live_url_note: Self-contained client-side build (site/index.html) published as a live Artifact. Replays the real deterministic Claude tool-use run in-browser with no backend; shows the 75% -> 100% before/after jump on one click. The Artifact is private until shared from its page.
run_instructions: Fastest: open the live_url. Locally (full harness): python -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && REPLAY_ONLY=1 uvicorn app.main:app --reload  then open http://127.0.0.1:8000  (deterministic replay mode needs no API key; set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and REPLAY_ONLY=0 to run the live Claude tool-use agent). The static build also opens directly: open site/index.html. See DEMO_GUIDE.md.
wedge: AgentReady harness — a live, reproducible agent task-success-rate metric that attributes each agent failure to a specific doc gap, and shows a before/after jump when the gap is patched.
magic_moment: On one screen, a real Claude tool-use agent runs a 12-task suite of concrete developer tasks against a bundled synthetic MemStore API using only the provided docs. First run against deliberately-gapped docs scores exactly 75% task success (9/12), with each of the 3 failures traced to a specific named doc gap: a wrong auth header (overview prose says 'Authorization: Bearer', server requires 'X-MemStore-Key' -> 401), an undocumented SQL-style metadata filter param, and a missing pagination cursor field. Click 'Apply doc patch' to swap in the complete docs and re-run: the same agent now scores 100% (12/12), the success-rate number climbs live, and every previously-failing task flips red -> green. Turns Manicule's '0% vs 25% agent error' marketing claim into a live, per-gap-attributed metric.

Evidence PNGs in evidence/ were regenerated (headless Chrome) against the 12-task site. CI returned checks-passed: the repo has no GitHub Actions workflow, so the monitor found no required checks and cleared green. PR #2 is open and ready for review/merge. secrets_scan: clean — no secrets in diff; .env and _local/ are git-ignored and untracked; only placeholder sk-ant-xxxx in .env.example

assets.DEMO_GUIDE.md: present, Loom talking points + company hooks
assets.site/index.html: present, self-contained static build (embedded deterministic run data) — no backend, GitHub-Pages/Artifact deployable

known_gaps: Live URL now shipped: site/index.html is a client-side rewrite that embeds the deterministic replay output, published as a live Artifact (see live_url). It is a faithful before/after replay, not the live FastAPI harness; the full backend (live Claude tool-use path, fresh-store side-effect checks) still requires a local run. No Python-host deploy token (Render/Fly/Railway) is configured, so the interactive backend itself is not hosted.

Live Claude tool-use path exists but the shipped demo defaults to deterministic REPLAY_ONLY mode (cached agent traces in replay/*.json) so it runs with no API key; the live path is exercised only when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set and REPLAY_ONLY=0.
The doc 'fix' is a pre-authored fixture swap (docs_gapped/ -> docs_fixed/), not LLM-generated on the fly.
Single bundled synthetic API (MemStore) only; arbitrary user-uploaded OpenAPI specs are out of scope.
Task suite is 12 fixed tasks (9 pass / 3 fail on the gapped docs); gap attribution is rule-based (capability -> named gap) with an optional LLM-judge fallback only when a live key is present.
